name: Shelter Signal V2 Daily Email Digest Outline
notes: This is a safe workflow outline, not a production-ready n8n export.
Do not add API keys, SMTP credentials, OAuth tokens, or recipient emails to this file.
The current V2 phase generates preview JSON/HTML only and does not send email.

nodes.name: Cron Trigger
nodes.purpose: Start the preview workflow once per day.

parameters.scheduleConcept: Daily at 08:00 in the configured workflow timezone

nodes.name: Ingestion Step
nodes.purpose: Run or document the rescued animal ingestion step before validation.

parameters.usesSecrets: ANIMAL_API_KEY from n8n credential or environment only

nodes.name: Validate SQL Pipeline
nodes.purpose: Apply SQL models and tests, including mart.alert_candidates.

nodes.name: Export Email Digest Preview
nodes.purpose: Generate local preview JSON and HTML without sending email.

nodes.name: Read Generated Email Digest HTML
nodes.purpose: Read the generated preview HTML for human review or later placeholder handoff.

nodes.name: Email Send Placeholder
nodes.purpose: Document the future email send step. This must remain disabled in the preview phase.

nodes.name: Error Handling Placeholder
nodes.purpose: Document future failure notification behavior without sending external notifications.
